text: Remove temporal phase UI and tests
description: Delete time-based phase rendering and progress concepts from the product. Remove date ranges, progress bars derived from now/from/to, smart-date helpers, and associated backend/frontend/e2e tests. Replace them with tests for explicit ordering and cursor-based active path behavior.

reflections.context: Removing all temporal phase artifacts after from/to was stripped from the data model — smart-date helpers, e2e tests, unit test mocks.
reflections.outcome: Deleted dateTimeUtils.ts (3 functions, fully unused), deleted smart-dates.spec.ts e2e test, cleaned from/to out of test-utils MockPhase interface and seedProject helper, and fixed the App.spec.ts phase mock. 125 lines net deleted, 0 regressions.
reflections.effectiveness: Straightforward grep-driven sweep. Caught all instances in one pass by searching for the function names and field patterns, not just filenames.
reflections.lesson: When removing a concept (temporal phases), grep for the data fields (from/to on Phase), utility functions (timestampToLocalDate), and test fixture helpers in one sweep — don't address them file by file or you leave orphans.
reflections.pattern: Same pattern as the normalizePhase fix: schema change cascades to multiple disconnected usage sites. A single grep sweep finds them all at once rather than discovering them one by one through failures.

status.comment: Deleted smart-dates.spec.ts e2e test and dateTimeUtils.ts (fully unused). Removed from/to from test-utils MockPhase interface and seedProject helper. Removed stale from/to fields from App.spec.ts phase mock. Removed dateTimeUtils export from shared/src/index.ts. 30/30 backend tests pass.
